stories.description: Migration adds aging_bucket column to ar_invoices

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: test reads SQL file via `fs.readFileSync` and asserts UP section contains exactly one `ALTER TABLE ar_invoices ADD COLUMN aging_bucket VARCHAR(16) NULL` line via regex match.
test reads file via `fs.readFileSync` and asserts DOWN section contains exactly one `ALTER TABLE ar_invoices DROP COLUMN aging_bucket` and zero other `DROP` occurrences (regex count).
5 invoice fixtures (ages 0, 15, 45, 75, 120 days) produce bucket assignments `current`, `1_30`, `31_60`, `61_90`, `90_plus`; test asserts exact values via `.toBe()`.
invoice with null `issued_at` results in `aging_bucket` staying null (test asserts `.toBeNull()`).
test spawns `node scripts/invoice-aging-nightly.cjs --dry-run` via `child_process.spawnSync`; asserts exit code 0 and stdout contains `"status":"dry-run"`.

runbook `docs/ops/invoice-aging-nightly.md` contains H2 sections `## Dry-run`, `## Production invocation`, `## Idempotency`, `## Failure alerting`, `## Cron example`, `## GitHub Actions example`, `## Rollback`; test reads file via `fs.readFileSync` and asserts each heading via regex.
test spawns wrapper with no `DATABASE_URL` env; asserts non-zero exit and stderr JSON contains `"error":"missing_database_url"`.
test reads `server/index.ts` via `fs.readFileSync` and asserts the import line and conditional `initSentry()` call via regex match.
integration test sets `process.env.SENTRY_DSN = 'test-dsn'`, mocks `initSentry`, imports `server/index`, asserts `initSentry` called exactly once.
integration test with `SENTRY_DSN` unset -> server module loads without throwing.

stories.description: Master program document + release checklist + sprint history

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: master plan contains H2 sections for all 13 sprints (B1..M); verified by `scripts/verify-program-docs.cjs` reading file via `fs.readFileSync` and asserting each heading via regex.
master plan contains `## Shipped Baseline (Sprint A)` section; verified by helper script.
release checklist contains tables for operator gates `OP-ACCT-*`, `OP-SIM-*`, `OP-DEV-*`, `OP-EAS-*`, `OP-STORE-*`, `OP-LEGAL-*`; verified by helper script.
sprint-history has initial entry with `dd8a8f4` Sprint A SHA.

stories.description: Baseline debt register populated with REAL entries

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: `docs/trucker-app-baseline-debt.md` exists and contains a markdown table with columns `file | failure | owner | first-seen | expiry | justification`; verified via `scripts/verify-baseline-debt.cjs` parsing the markdown table using `fs.readFileSync` + regex.
register either contains >= 1 real entry OR an explicit `| _(verified clean at <date>)_ |` placeholder row; helper script asserts one of the two.

doc contains table with columns `Variable`, `Category`, `Local`, `Staging`, `Production`, `EAS Build-time`, `Scope`, `Rotation`; verified via helper script reading file with `fs.readFileSync` and matching header via regex.
doc contains H2 section `## EXPO_PUBLIC_* rule` stating that mobile public keys MUST use the prefix and server secrets MUST NOT.

stories.description: Feature flags doc + migration numbering rule

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: feature flags doc lists all 6 flags (`FEATURE_TRUCKER_MOBILE_BETA`, `FEATURE_MOTIVE_ELD`, `FEATURE_BROKER_CREDIT`, `FEATURE_FACILITY_DWELL`, `FEATURE_FREEMIUM_QUOTA`, `FEATURE_FORCE_UPGRADE`); helper script reads file and asserts each flag name via regex.
migration-numbering doc contains the placeholder rule and assignment procedure; helper script asserts H2 sections `## Placeholder convention` and `## Assignment procedure`.

stories.description: feature_flags DB table + read/write endpoint + server/index.ts mount

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: migration creates `feature_flags` table with 6 columns (id, tenant_id, flag_name, flag_value, updated_at, updated_by); test reads SQL file via `fs.readFileSync`.
`GET /api/feature-flags` returns merged flag map (env + DB) for authenticated user's tenant; integration test via supertest.
`PUT /api/feature-flags/:name` requires admin role; non-admin returns HTTP 403 (auth-negative Rule 16).
`server/index.ts` mount line `app.use('/api/feature-flags', featureFlagsRouter)` present; test reads file via `fs.readFileSync` and asserts via regex match (no shell grep).

helper script `scripts/verify-saas-regression.cjs` runs `npx vitest run src/__tests__/` and `cd server && npx vitest run __tests__/routes/accounting.test.ts __tests__/routes/ifta.test.ts __tests__/middleware/requireAuth.test.ts` via `child_process.spawnSync`, captures exit codes, asserts all 0 (modulo baseline debt exclusions).
